tasks.label: Compilar Java para bin
tasks.command: $sources = Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}\src' -Recurse -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object FullName; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path '${workspaceFolder}\bin' | Out-Null; javac --release 21 -encoding UTF-8 -cp '${workspaceFolder}\lib\*' -d '${workspaceFolder}\bin' $sources
